name: order_id
description: The unique identifier for the customer order

name: customer_name
description: The full name of the customer who placed the order

name: amount
description: The monetary value of the order transaction

name: status
description: The current fulfillment or processing status of the order

name: order_date
description: The calendar date on which the order was placed

name: warehouse_id
description: The identifier of the warehouse where the order is fulfilled

name: batch_date
description: Audit column to identify the record is newly inserted.

name: processed_dttm
description: System timestamp indicating when the record was loaded
